notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with working formation movement, shields, mystery ship, waves, and audio; alien sprites are geometric approximations rather than classic pixel art, and the defeat line at Y=490 is very close to the shield line making the game feel cramped, but overall mechanics are complete and functional.
Excellent implementation with destructible shields and solid core mechanics, though aliens reaching the bottom drains lives sequentially instead of triggering an instant game over.
A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone with working waves, shields, bullets, pause, and scoring, but it is visually simplified and misses some classic polish and exact behavior.
